results.rendered_html:
kṣaura (von kṣura)
1〉 n. das Abrasiren der Haare  H. 924 . keśavamanārtapuraṃ pāṭaliputraṃ purīmahicchatrām . ditimaditiṃ ca smaratāṃ kṣauravidhau bhavati kalyāṇam ..  VṚDDHAGĀRGYA _im_ ŚKDR.  kṣauraṃ kṛtvā  HIT. 101,6 .  Verz. d. B. H. No. 1326 . kṣaura und kṣauramantrāḥ  SĀY. _zu_ TS. 1,2,1 (pag. 274, ult. 275,2) .
— 2〉 f. ī Schermesser  WILS.
